name: oh-my-gjc
description: oh-my-gajaecode — focused Gajae Code suite with 7 skills and 9 commands. Skills: adaptive-response, no-english, extragoal, insane-review, deep-onboarding, preset-pack, multi-harness-research. Commands: /omg, /omg:setup, /omg:gate, /omg:gate-always, /omg:no-english, /omg:insane-review, /omg:deep-onboarding, /omg:preset-pack, /omg:multi-harness. Multi-harness research is explicit-only, directly fans one identical task to exactly four read-only harnesses, and writes results only outside the project in XDG state; it requires Linux, bubblewrap, existing provider logins, and a private user runtime binding. Preset-pack merges the curated daily/agent profiles (human vs unattended-agent seat maps) into the user's models.yml only on explicit /omg:preset-pack invocation, after backup, name-scoped, leaving all other profiles and top-level keys untouched. The installer itself never modifies models.yml.
